issue.message: Missing permissions required by NotificationManagerCompat.notify: android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
Calling `setType` after calling `setData` will clear the data: Call `setDataAndType` instead?
When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more

This `minSdkVersion` value (`31`) is not used; it is always overridden by the value specified in the Gradle build script (`31`)
This `targetSdkVersion` value (`35`) is not used; it is always overridden by the value specified in the Gradle build script (`35`)
Reading Resources using LocalContext.current.resources
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("seconds"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="set_timer_message" translatable="false">Setting the timer for %1$d seconds.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("models"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Using `setJavaScriptEnabled` can introduce XSS vulnerabilities into your application, review carefully
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 31
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 31. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.

issue.message: The resource `R.string.benchmark_comparison_help_content` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="benchmark_comparison_help_content" translatable="false">Compare benchmark runs by tapping the **Baseline** chip on any run result card to set the run as the comparison baseline. We\'ll automatically calculate and display the percentage differences in **all other** run result cards.</string>

The resource `R.string.mcp_disclaimer_dialog_content` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="mcp_disclaimer_dialog_content" translatable="false">Third-party MCPs are not authored or endorsed by Google. Google is not responsible for their contents, security, or data handling practices.

Please exercise caution before providing sensitive information, such as personal identification, tokens, or API keys.

Any use of an MCP is subject to the applicable terms for that MCP.</string>

`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
